The stars Krttika and Rohinl constitute the Body oj the year
(personified); the two As^dhas are the navel; Aslesa, the heart; and
Magha the flower. If these lunar mansions are devoid of malefics,
the effect will be beneficial. If the Body is afflicted by malefics
through conjunction or aspect, there will be danger from fire and
wind. Ifthe miw/is afflicted, there will be threat of famine. If
the is afflicted, destruction of roots and fruits will ensue.
Lastly if the heart is afflicted, undoubtedly there will be destruction
of crops.
[This verse gives clues to find out if the particular year of
Jupiter would be well or ill. Just as Time is personified as
even so here the year is personified as I feel that here
the person is to be taken as female in view of the flower.
